label: Expectation
description: Defines an expectation tier used for colony wealth, pawn mood, recreation requirements, titles, roles, and ritual quality.

order.label: Order
order.description: Numeric rank used to sort and compare expectation tiers. Must be zero or greater; the runtime reports a config error for negative values.

thoughtStage.label: Thought stage
thoughtStage.description: Zero-based stage index selected by ThoughtWorker_Expectations for the active expectation thought. Negative one means no stage is assigned.

maxMapWealth.label: Maximum map wealth
maxMapWealth.description: Exclusive colony wealth threshold used during expectation-tier selection. Values below zero disable wealth-triggered selection for this tier; a non-negative value makes the tier eligible when the current map wealth is less than this threshold.

joyToleranceDropPerDay.label: Joy tolerance drop per day
joyToleranceDropPerDay.description: Daily rate at which recreation tolerance decays for pawns at this expectation tier, used by JoyToleranceSet and displayed in pawn recreation information.

ritualQualityOffset.label: Ritual quality offset
ritualQualityOffset.description: Signed offset applied to ritual outcome quality calculations for pawns at this expectation tier. Negative values lower ritual quality; positive values raise it.

joyKindsNeeded.label: Joy kinds needed
joyKindsNeeded.description: Number of distinct recreation kinds that must be available before the insufficient-joy-sources alert is considered satisfied for pawns at this tier.

forRoles.label: For roles
forRoles.description: When true, this tier is included in the role-specific expectation lookup used by Ideology roles. Wealth-triggered and role-triggered tiers are tracked independently.
